rulings.Case Title: JEFFREY HEUER et al VS. KATHERINE ROBERTS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Pltf'S For Post-Judgment Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 25, 2011, line 1. Plaintiffs Jeffrey Heuer and Robin Weisberger's Motion for Post-Judgment Attorney's fees is off calendar - stayed. Bankruptcy filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 601 O'FARRELL, LLC VS. JESSE HARTMAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Deeming Matters Admitted And Awarding Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, October 25, 2011, line 3. Defendant Jesse Hartman's Motion for Order Compelling Responses to Discovery and Sanctions - granted. Total sanctions in the amount of $337.50 subject to opposition. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)
